name: Yard Analyzer — Production Health
description: Day-one dashboard. Filter all charts on env: production.
fieldPathNote: Axiom's nextJsFormatters flattens payload keys with literal dots: emitted `{ env, kind, ok, route, durationMs, ... }` lands as `fields.env`, `fields.kind`, etc. (single field name with a dot, not a nested object). APL needs the bracket-quote escape for these: `['fields.env']`. Top-level fields like `level`, `message`, `source`, `_time` need no escaping. Also note: when the code calls `logger.info("cron.run", { ... })`, Axiom puts the string `cron.run` in the top-level `message` field, so `message == 'cron.run'` is a cleaner filter than `['fields.kind'] == 'cron.run'`.

charts.name: Cron health (last 7 days)
charts.apl: ['yard-analyzer'] | where ['fields.env'] == 'production' and message == 'cron.run' | extend ok = ['fields.ok'], route = tostring(['fields.route']), durationMs = ['fields.durationMs'] | summarize ok_count = countif(ok == true), failed = countif(ok == false), p50_ms = percentile(durationMs, 50), p95_ms = percentile(durationMs, 95) by route, bin(_time, 1d) | order by _time desc

charts.name: AI cost — daily totals
charts.apl: ['yard-analyzer'] | where ['fields.env'] == 'production' and message == 'ai.daily_summary' | summarize costUsd = max(todouble(['fields.totals.costUsd'])), failures = max(toint(['fields.totals.failures'])) by bin(_time, 1d)

charts.name: AI cost — top 10 users (last 7d)
charts.apl: ['yard-analyzer'] | where ['fields.env'] == 'production' and message == 'ai.daily_summary' and _time > ago(7d) | extend topUsers = ['fields.topUsers'] | mv-expand topUsers | summarize calls = sum(toint(topUsers.calls)), costUsd = sum(todouble(topUsers.costUsd)) by userId = tostring(topUsers.userId) | order by costUsd desc | take 10

charts.name: Rate-limit hits by route (last 24h)
charts.apl: ['yard-analyzer'] | where ['fields.env'] == 'production' and message == 'rate_limit.hit' and _time > ago(24h) | summarize hits = count() by route = tostring(['fields.route']), bin(_time, 1h)

charts.name: Errors (last 1h)
charts.apl: ['yard-analyzer'] | where ['fields.env'] == 'production' and level == 'error' | order by _time desc | take 100
